CustomField.formula: if( MO__c == null, if(BOM__r.For_Multiples__c != null && BOM__r.For_Multiples__c > 0, (BOM__r.Quantity__c * MCEILING( Work_Order__r.Quantity_Ordered__c / BOM__r.For_Multiples__c)),BOM__r.Quantity__c * Work_Order__r.Quantity_Ordered__c),BOM__r.Quantity__c * MO__r.Quantity__c )
CustomField.label: Expected Quantity
